title: Vehicle Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Vehicle Donation Programs 5 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GRANTS PASS AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY CARS FOR HOMES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Individuals can support Habitat for Humanity's local and global programs by donating their cars, trucks, boats, RVs, or other vehicles. Proceeds from the sale of the vehicle support Habitat's mission of providing homes for people in need. 409 NE E Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon. Closed federal holidays and for inclement weather. Email (877) 277-4344 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON PUBLIC BROADCASTING VEHICLE DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a way for individuals to donate automobiles and recreational vehicles (RVs).The program is handled by Speed's Towing. All proceeds from vehicle sales go back to agency and individuals will receive a tax credit. All vehicles must have engines, be towable, and not have any liens on title. 7140 S Macadam Avenue Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 421-3273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION DRIVE AWAY HUNGER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of automobiles, recreational vehicles, boats, motorcycles, medium to heavy trucks, buses, and fleet vehicles. Vehicle donations are tax-deductible, and proceeds go towards programs within Portland Rescue Mission. 8301 NE Jonesmore Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Sales Lot Hours: Tuesday-Friday noon-5pm Email (503) 906-7673 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of vehicles, commercially packaged food (canned, boxed, fresh, frozen, or dried), baby food/formula, pet food, clothing, socks, shoes, blankets, bedding, pillows, towels, washcloths, personal care/hygiene products, new toys, books, school supplies, and diapers (infant, toddler, or adult). Offers volunteer opportunities for a variety of roles. 17788 SE Pine Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (503) 674-8785 Get Directions Visit Website More Details U-TURN FOR CHRIST U-TURN FOR CHRIST THRIFT STORE VEHICLE DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a place to donate a car, truck, motorcycle, boat, RV, or trailer. Works in partnersip with Drive Away Addiction. 100 Lewis Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted; vehicle must have an engine and be towable Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 291-3040 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRANTS PASS AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY CARS FOR HOMES PROGRAM OREGON PUBLIC BROADCASTING VEHICLE DONATION PROGRAM PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION DRIVE AWAY HUNGER SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING U-TURN FOR CHRIST VEHICLE DONATION PROGRAM
